spouse.name: Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil

children.name: Third Earl Leicester Robert III de Beaumont

zh.lifeSummary: Richard於大約1165年出生在艾歐洛。他和Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil至少有1個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard于大约1165年出生在艾歐洛。他和Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil至少有1个儿子。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard was born about 1165, in Europe. He had at least 1 son with Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard est né environ 1165, à Europe. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Richard wurde um 1165 in Europa geboren. Er hatte mit Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard è nato il circa 1165 nel Europa. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Richardは約1165年にヨーロッパで生まれた。彼はAmice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuilとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard(은)는 대략 1165년 우럽에서 태어났다. 그는 Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Europa. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard родился около 1165 г. в местности Европа. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Richard nació aproximadamente 1165, en Europa. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Amice De Gael Heiress Of Breteuil. Murió en su pueblo.

th.abt 1120–: ประมาณปี 1165–ถึงแก่กรรม
